name: noteforge
description: Offline-first note editor with Excalidraw, microservices backend

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:notes" "npm run dev:media"
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: npm run migrate --workspace=packages/auth-service && npm run migrate --workspace=packages/notes-service
